description_long: This is a classic red fire extinguisher with a cylindrical metal body and a black hose attached near the top. The extinguisher features a prominent black handle and lever mechanism, as well as a visible safety pin and ring for tamper prevention. White instructional labels and pictograms are printed on the front, providing clear usage guidance. The hose is flexible, black, and extends from the valve assembly, curving downward and secured at the base. The top assembly includes a metallic valve and nozzle, with the handle and lever positioned for easy grip and operation. The overall finish is smooth and glossy, with the red color dominating the body and black accents on the hose and handle.
description: A red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black hose, handle, and white instructional labels on the front. It features a safety pin, lever, and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: The extinguisher is viewed from the back, showing the full length of the black hose curving down the front and the top handle assembly.
description_view_1: The front view displays the white instructional labels, the black hose extending from the valve, and the handle and lever mechanism clearly visible.
description_view_2: This rear-side angle highlights the smooth red body, the top handle, and the safety pin, with only a partial view of the label.
description_view_3: A side view showing the uninterrupted red cylinder, the black hose arching outward, and the handle and lever at the top.
attribute_label_or_signage: White instructional labels and pictograms are present on the front of the cylinder, featuring text and symbols for usage guidance.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black, flexible hose is attached near the top, curving downward and extending nearly the full height of the extinguisher.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A metallic safety pin with a circular pull ring is visible at the top near the handle.
